scenarios.title: Budget Night Out
scenarios.story: You are helping a narrator who wants an affordable movie night this weekend. They care most about lower ticket prices and are willing to travel farther if the total cost is better.

scenarios.title: Family Weekend Plan
scenarios.story: You are helping a narrator coordinating a family movie plan. They prefer daytime showtimes, convenient locations, and choices with enough open seats for group seating.

scenarios.title: Late Thriller Hunt
scenarios.story: You are helping a narrator looking for a late-night thriller experience. They prioritize evening times, premium seats when available, and are less sensitive to distance.
